narrative:
Precinct West Twp East Rochester (precinct in Columbiana County) has 1,293 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.8 percentage points.
